${modID}:ExampleCard.NAME: Name
${modID}:ExampleCard.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This will automatically be used if the card is upgraded. Remove it if unneeded.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: You can put more text in here.
If you need to use it for stuff.
Blizzard is a good example for this.

${modID}:SlaughterDemon.NAME: Slaughter Demon
${modID}:SlaughterDemon.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If this is the first Attack played in combat, deal !D! more damage.

${modID}:CursedFlow.NAME: Cursed Flow
${modID}:CursedFlow.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If the last card played was an Attack, gain 4 additional Block.

${modID}:MartialArtsMastery.NAME: Martial Arts Mastery
${modID}:MartialArtsMastery.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw 1 card. If it is an Attack, gain [E].

${modID}:BlackFlash.NAME: Black Flash
${modID}:BlackFlash.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Gain [E] for every Attack played this turn.

${modID}:CursedEnergyInfusion.NAME: Cursed Energy Infusion
${modID}:CursedEnergyInfusion.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust an Attack in your hand. Add a *Black* *Flash* to your hand. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Cleave.NAME: Cleave
${modID}:Cleave.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If the enemy has Block, deal !M! extra damage.

${modID}:Spiderweb.NAME: Spiderweb
${modID}:Spiderweb.DESCRIPTION: Costs 1 less for each *Cleave* played this combat. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. Apply !M! Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

${modID}:DivineFlame.NAME: Divine Flame (Fuuga)
${modID}:DivineFlame.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Deals !M! additional damage for every *Shrine* card played this turn.

${modID}:MalevolentShrine.NAME: Malevolent Shrine
${modID}:MalevolentShrine.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, deal !M! damage to ALL enemies for every card played this turn.

${modID}:Nue.NAME: Nue
${modID}:Nue.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If the target has no Block, gain 2 Dexterity until end of turn. NL *Shikigami*: If a *Ten Shadows* card was played this turn, gain [E].

${modID}:Gama.NAME: Gama
${modID}:Gama.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! *Gama* to an enemy. NL (At the end of their turn, they take damage and you gain Block).

${modID}:Mahoraga.NAME: Mahoraga
${modID}:Mahoraga.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Gain 2 Artifact and *Adaptation*. NL (Adapts whenever you take damage).

${modID}:GreatSerpent.NAME: Great Serpent
${modID}:GreatSerpent.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Your next *Ten* *Shadows* Attack applies *Poison* equal to the damage dealt.

${modID}:MaxElephant.NAME: Max Elephant
${modID}:MaxElephant.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Costs [E] less for each *Shikigami* in your hand.

${modID}:RabbitEscape.NAME: Rabbit Escape
${modID}:RabbitEscape.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust any number of cards in your hand. For each card exhausted, add a *Rabbit* to your hand.
${modID}:RabbitEscape.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Exhaust any number of cards in your hand. For each card exhausted, add a *Rabbit+* to your hand.

${modID}:Rabbit.NAME: Rabbit
${modID}:Rabbit.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Gain 1 Dexterity until end of turn. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:RoundDeer.NAME: Round Deer
${modID}:RoundDeer.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Remove all Debuffs. NL *Shikigami*: If a *Ten Shadows* card was played this turn, heal !M! HP. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:PiercingOx.NAME: Piercing Ox
${modID}:PiercingOx.DESCRIPTION: Deal !M! damage for each *Ten* *Shadows* or *Shikigami* card played this combat. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:TigerFuneral.NAME: Tiger Funeral
${modID}:TigerFuneral.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play a *Ten* *Shadows* card, gain !M! Strength until end of turn.

${modID}:Agito.NAME: Merged Beast Agito
${modID}:Agito.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, deal !M! damage to a random enemy, gain !${modID}:BLOCK! Block, !${modID}:STR! Strength and heal !${modID}:HEAL! HP.

${modID}:TenShadowsTechnique.NAME: Ten Shadows Technique
${modID}:TenShadowsTechnique.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Strength and !M! Dexterity. NL Whenever you play a unique *Ten* *Shadows* card, count it. NL Once 10 unique shadows are invoked, all *Ten* *Shadows* cards are played twice.

${modID}:LapseBlue.NAME: Lapse: Blue
${modID}:LapseBlue.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !M! card. NL If *Reversal:* *Red* was played this turn, Exhaust both and create a *Hollow* *Purple*. NL *Limitless*.
${modID}:LapseBlue.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !M! cards. NL If *Reversal:* *Red* was played this turn, Exhaust both and create a *Hollow* *Purple*. NL *Limitless*.

${modID}:ReversalRed.NAME: Reversal: Red
${modID}:ReversalRed.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the enemy is attacking, apply !M! Weak and !M! Vulnerable. NL If *Lapse:* *Blue* was played this turn, Exhaust both and create a *Hollow* *Purple*. NL *Limitless*.

${modID}:InfinityBarrier.NAME: Infinity Barrier
${modID}:InfinityBarrier.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play a card, gain !M! Block. NL *Limitless*.

${modID}:HollowPurple.NAME: Hollow Purple
${modID}:HollowPurple.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL Return the exhausted *Lapse:* *Blue* and *Reversal:* *Red* to your hand. NL Exhaust. NL *Limitless*.

${modID}:SixEyes.NAME: Six Eyes
${modID}:SixEyes.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, Scry !M! and gain [E]. NL *Limitless*.
${modID}:SixEyes.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, Scry !M! and gain [E] [E]. Your *Limitless* cards cost 1 energy less. NL *Limitless*.

${modID}:UnlimitedVoid.NAME: Unlimited Void
${modID}:UnlimitedVoid.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, deal !${modID}:DAMAGE! damage to ALL enemies. Reduce all attack damage taken by !M!. If damage is reduced to 0, gain [E]. NL *Limitless*.
${modID}:UnlimitedVoid.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, deal !${modID}:DAMAGE! damage to ALL enemies. Reduce all attack damage taken by !M!. If damage is reduced to 0, gain [E]. NL *Limitless*.

${modID}:CurtainLimitless.NAME: Curtain: Limitless
${modID}:CurtainLimitless.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If *Six* *Eyes* is active, draw 1 card. NL *Limitless*.

${modID}:RikaProtectiveEmbrace.NAME: Rika: Protective Embrace
${modID}:RikaProtectiveEmbrace.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If you have an active Power, gain 1 #yBlur. NL *Shikigami*.

${modID}:ImmeasurableCursedEnergy.NAME: Immeasurable Cursed Energy
${modID}:ImmeasurableCursedEnergy.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, gain [E].

${modID}:RikaSoulGrasp.NAME: Rika: Soul Grasp
${modID}:RikaSoulGrasp.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Your next card played this turn is played twice. NL *Shikigami*.

${modID}:QueenOfCurses.NAME: The Queen of Curses
${modID}:QueenOfCurses.DESCRIPTION: Your *Shikigami* cards deal 50% more damage and provide 50% more Block. NL *Shikigami*.

${modID}:AuthenticMutualLove.NAME: Authentic Mutual Love
${modID}:AuthenticMutualLove.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, gain !M! #yFocus and add a random card from another character's pool to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.

${modID}:PureLoveBeam.NAME: Pure Love Beam
${modID}:PureLoveBeam.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage X times. NL Damage increases with #yFocus. NL *Shikigami*.
